description: Composition White boat neck T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% modal, has short sleeves with graphic print on the front and branding on the hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry German brand puma specializes in minimalism and simplicity. This t-shirt from puma with its easy silhouette and fabric falls neatly over from shoulders. Simple and classy, pair this piece with fitted denims, a dark hued vest and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
